title: Radiant Ore Borders
description: Adds emissive ore borders to Minecraft
body:
Radiant Ore Borders is a texture pack that adds glowing ores with borders into Minecraft, making it easier to see in caves!\
If you want glowing ores without borders, try [Radiant Ores](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/radiant-ores).\
![Radiant Ore Borders](https://i.ibb.co/tDj2QBF/2024-12-07-10-55-29.png)\
Please note this requires [Optifine](https://optifine.net/home), [Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity) or another mod that supports emissive textures.
Enjoy!
